name: Seducer Simulator
description:
You’re a playboy/playgirl who’s out looking for some fun or more. The AI will generate all kinds of different girls for you to try and seduce with varying approaches working on different girls. How many can you conquer? But be careful because some ladies may fall in love and want to get serious and other girls may have boyfriends!

You can also search for a specific type of girl like a punk, mime, boxer, or whatever else you can think of.

Test your seduction skills or build some then get laid! Group sex and other kinks can happen too! Gotta hit 100% seduction!

Unlike other Sims, this one has a ton of NPCs built in so you’re guaranteed to find intricate unique characters.

Tags: NTR, Sim, Seduction, Dating Sim
